creator: chris@smartt.com
text:
The port www/pear-HTML_AJAX doesn't install it's javascript files from the /js/ folder in the tarball. These are need by the script to function.

Fix: 

By default they are expected to be in @data-dir@/HTML_AJAX/js/ where @data-dir@ in Server.php should be replaced via a sed script with /usr/local/share/pear/data/
